title: microchloa altera
intro: Microchloa altera, also known as Althernan grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Microchloa altera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling its leaves and stems in water to make a decoction, or by drying and powdering the leaves to make a herbal tea.
